title: Fatigue's GUI lib
description: library mod for gui related stuff, very basic
body:
Fatigue GUI Lib is a **_lightweight_** Fabric GUI library for Minecraft 1.21.11.

It provides simple reusable screen building blocks like **labels, panels, buttons, toggles, themes, and base screen layout helpers**. 

The mod also includes optional example content that demonstrates how another mod can depend on the library and open custom styled GUI screens.
